vocab.meaning: khơi dậy nghệ sĩ bên trong tôi
vocab.example: Primary school art classes were the first time I was truly encouraged to unleash my inner artist.

vocab.meaning: khiếu nghệ thuật (phong cách hào hoa)
vocab.example: My teacher noticed I had a bit of an artistic flair when it came to choosing bold color palettes.
I spent many summer afternoons trying to hone my craft by sketching the fruit bowls in our kitchen.
Even as a child, I was drawn to painting because I saw it as a powerful form of visual storytelling.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thoát ly thực tại
vocab.example: Whenever I picked up a paintbrush, it provided a sense of escapism from the pressures of schoolwork.

vocab.meaning: thử sai (học qua việc làm và sửa lỗi)
vocab.example: Learning to mix colors was a process of trial and error until I could get the shades just right.

vocab.meaning: sự tự do thể hiện bản thân
vocab.example: I loved abstract painting because it offered more expressive freedom than trying to draw realistically.
Sketching 3D objects helped me develop better spatial awareness at quite a young age.

vocab.meaning: năng lực tưởng tượng tuyệt vời
vocab.example: Art assignments allowed me to showcase my imaginative prowess by creating fantastical worlds on paper.

vocab.meaning: một sở thích ngắn hạn/thoáng qua
vocab.example: Unfortunately, painting turned out to be a fleeting hobby for me as I eventually shifted my focus to music.
